1→{
     2→	"name": "recommendations-service",
     3→	"version": "0.0.1",
     4→	"description": "recommendations service for CI",
     5→	"author": "4thwithme",
     6→	"private": true,
     7→	"engines": {
     8→		"node": ">=v24.13.0",
     9→		"npm": ">=11.0.0"
    10→	},
    11→	"license": "UNLICENSED",
    12→	"scripts": {
    13→		"build": "nest build && npm run build:migrations && npm run copy:assets",
    14→		"build:migrations": "tsc --project src/migrations/tsconfig.json && tsc-alias -p src/migrations/tsconfig.json",
    15→		"copy:assets": "cp -r src/assets dist/assets && mkdir -p dist/seeds && cp src/seeds/*.csv dist/seeds/",
    16→		"format": "prettier --write \"src/**/*.ts\" \"test/**/*.ts\"",
    17→		"type-check": "tsc --noEmit",
    18→		"start": "nest start -e 'node -r newrelic'",
    19→		"start:dev": "nest start --watch --webpack --webpackPath webpack.config.js",
    20→		"🐎": "nest start --watch --webpack --webpackPath webpack.config.js",
    21→		"start:debug": "nest start --debug --watch --webpack --webpackPath webpack.config.js",
    22→		"start:prod": "node dist/main",
    23→		"lint": "eslint \"{src,apps,libs,test}/**/*.ts\"",
    24→		"lint:fix": "eslint \"{src,apps,libs,test}/**/*.ts\" --fix",
    25→		"code-quality-check": "npm run lint && npm run format && npm run type-check",
    26→		"test:unit": "dotenv -e .env.test -- npx jest --config ./test/jest-unit.config.ts",
    27→		"test:e2e": "npm run db:reset:test && dotenv -e .env.test -- npx jest --runInBand --forceExit --config ./test/jest-e2e.config.ts",
    28→		"test:unit:coverage": "dotenv -e .env.test -- npx jest --config ./test/jest-unit.coverage.config.ts",
    29→		"test:e2e:coverage": "npm run db:reset:test && dotenv -e .env.test -- npx jest --runInBand --forceExit --config ./test/jest-e2e.coverage.config.ts",
    30→		"test": "npm run code-quality-check && (npm run test:unit & npm run test:e2e & wait)",
    31→		"test:coverage": "npm run code-quality-check && (npm run test:unit:coverage & npm run test:e2e:coverage & wait)",
    32→		"prepare": "husky || true",
    33→		"artillery-load-test": "npx artillery run --environment test --output report.json --record --key $ARTILLERY_KEY ./src/scripts/load-testing/artillery.yml",
    34→		"cli:dev": "ts-node --log-error -r tsconfig-paths/register src/cli.ts",
    35→		"cli:prod": "node dist/cli.js",
    36→		"migrate": "ts-node -r dotenv/config -r tsconfig-paths/register ./node_modules/.bin/knex migrate:latest --knexfile ./src/knexfile.ts && npm run generate:db-uml",
    37→		"migrate:prod": "node -r dotenv/config ./node_modules/.bin/knex migrate:latest --knexfile ./dist/knexfile.prod.js",
    38→		"migrate:rollback": "ts-node -r dotenv/config -r tsconfig-paths/register ./node_modules/.bin/knex migrate:rollback --knexfile ./src/knexfile.ts",
    39→		"migrate:up": "ts-node -r dotenv/config -r tsconfig-paths/register ./node_modules/.bin/knex migrate:up --knexfile ./src/knexfile.ts && npm run generate:db-uml",
    40→		"migrate:down": "ts-node -r dotenv/config -r tsconfig-paths/register ./node_modules/.bin/knex migrate:down --knexfile ./src/knexfile.ts",
    41→		"migrate:make": "ts-node -r dotenv/config -r tsconfig-paths/register ./node_modules/.bin/knex migrate:make --knexfile ./src/knexfile.ts -x ts",
    42→		"db:reset:test": "dotenv -e .env.test -- ts-node -r tsconfig-paths/register ./scripts/reset-test-db.ts",
    43→		"generate:db-uml": "dotenv -e .env -- ts-node -r tsconfig-paths/register ./src/scripts/generate-db-uml.script.ts"
    44→	},
    45→	"dependencies": {
    46→		"@aws-sdk/client-sqs": "^3.1000.0",
    47→		"@aws-sdk/types": "^3.910.0",
    48→		"@fastify/static": "^9.0.0",

1→#
     2→# This stage takes the source code, install app the dependencies (including dev ones)
     3→# and finally build the source code to the dist folder.
     4→FROM 916869144969.dkr.ecr.us-east-1.amazonaws.com/customink/nodejs:jammy-24 AS build
     5→
     6→# Create app directory
     7→WORKDIR /app
     8→
     9→# Install app dependencies
    10→# Note: Doing dependencies first and only helps speed up next builds thanks to Docker Layer caching.
    11→COPY package*.json ./
    12→# Set up authentication for GitHub Packages
    13→# This is a safe solution because Docker layering is persisted only one time in RUN,
    14→# so the secret won't leak into the final image, or any other intermediate layers.
    15→RUN --mount=type=secret,id=github_token \
    16→    echo "//npm.pkg.github.com/:_authToken=$(cat /run/secrets/github_token)" > ~/.npmrc && \
    17→    echo "@customink:registry=https://npm.pkg.github.com" >> ~/.npmrc && \
    18→    npm ci \
    19→    && rm ~/.npmrc
    20→
    21→# Bundle app source
    22→COPY . .
    23→
    24→# Build the source
    25→RUN npm run build
    26→
    27→# Build Stage 2 - The Disctribution image
    28→#
    29→# This is the stage that is used for the final Docker image.
    30→# It cointains only the built scripts and no dev dependencies.
    31→FROM 916869144969.dkr.ecr.us-east-1.amazonaws.com/customink/nodejs:jammy-24 AS dist
    32→
    33→USER root
    34→
    35→# Set node env 
    36→ARG NODE_ENV=production
    37→ENV NODE_ENV=${NODE_ENV}
    38→
    39→ARG COMMIT_HASH
    40→ENV APP_VERSION=${COMMIT_HASH}
    41→
    42→RUN echo "Etc/UTC" > /etc/timezone
    43→ENV TZ="Etc/UTC"
    44→
    45→WORKDIR /app
    46→
    47→COPY --from=build --chown=app:app /app/package*.json ./
    48→COPY --from=build --chown=app:app /app/dist ./dist
    49→COPY --chown=app:app ./newrelic.js ./
    50→COPY --chown=app:app ./bin/cron-trending-items ./bin/
    51→COPY --chown=app:app ./bin/cron-sync-source-styles ./bin/
    52→COPY --chown=app:app ./bin/cron-populate-style-copurchases ./bin/
    53→RUN chmod +x ./bin/cron-trending-items && \
    54→    chmod +x ./bin/cron-sync-source-styles && \
    55→    chmod +x ./bin/cron-populate-style-copurchases
    56→
    57→USER app
    58→
    59→RUN --mount=type=secret,id=github_token \
    60→    echo "//npm.pkg.github.com/:_authToken=$(cat /run/secrets/github_token)" > ~/.npmrc && \
    61→    echo "@customink:registry=https://npm.pkg.github.com" >> ~/.npmrc && \
    62→    npm ci \
    63→    && rm ~/.npmrc
    64→
    65→EXPOSE 8080
    66→
    67→HEALTHCHECK --interval=30s --timeout=10s --start-period=30s --retries=3 \
    68→  CMD curl -f http://localhost:8080/is_it_up || exit 1
    69→
    70→CMD ["npm", "run", "start:prod"]
    71→

content.text:
Perfect! Now let me compile all findings. Let me create a comprehensive summary document:

## Comprehensive Port and Configuration Analysis

Based on my analysis of the recommendations-service project, here are all the ports, environment variables, and configuration details:

### 1. **HTTP Server Port**

**File:** `/Users/4thwithme/Documents/repo/recommendations-service/src/main.ts` (line 39, 102)

- **Development Port:** `9009` (from `.env` line 1)
- **Test Port:** `9010` (from `.env.test` line 1)
- **Production Port:** `8080` (from `Dockerfile` line 65 - exposed in Docker)
- **Default Bind Address:** `0.0.0.0` (listens on all interfaces)

The port is read from the `PORT` environment variable and the app listens on all interfaces (`0.0.0.0`).

### 2. **Redis/Cache Ports**

**Files:**
- `/Users/4thwithme/Documents/repo/recommendations-service/src/modules/cache/cache.module.ts`
- `.env` files

**Configuration:**

| Environment | Write Redis URL | Read Redis URL |
|---|---|---|
| Development | `redis://localhost:6377` | `redis://localhost:6378` |
| Test | `redis://localhost:6377` | `redis://localhost:6377` |
| Production | Not in .env (passed via environment) | Not in .env (passed via environment) |

**Environment Variables:**
- `REDIS_URL` - Redis write connection (default: `redis://localhost:6377`)
- `REDIS_READ_URL` - Redis read connection (default: `redis://localhost:6378`)

### 3. **MySQL Database Ports**

**File:** `/Users/4thwithme/Documents/repo/recommendations-service/src/modules/db/db.module.ts`

**Configuration:**

| Database | Development | Test | Production |
|---|---|---|---|
| **Write (Master)** | `mysql://app_user:app_password@localhost:3336/recommendations` | `mysql://app_user:ci-test-app-only@localhost:3336/recommendations_test` | Uses environment variable |
| **Read Replica** | `mysql://app_user:app_password@localhost:3337/recommendations` | `mysql://app_user:ci-test-app-only@localhost:3336/recommendations_test` | Uses environment variable |

**Ports Used:**
- Write Database: **3336**
- Read Replica: **3337** (development only)

**Environment Variables:**
- `DATABASE_URL` - MySQL write connection string
- `DATABASE_URL_READ_REPLICA` - MySQL read replica connection string

### 4. **OpenSearch/Neural Search Port**

**Files:** `.env` (lines 24-30)

**Configuration:**
- **Host:** `http://localhost:9201`
- **Dashboards URL:** `http://localhost:5601`
- **Port:** `9201` (OpenSearch)
- **Port:** `5601` (OpenSearch Dashboards)

**Environment Variables:**
- `OPENSEARCH_HOST` - OpenSearch server URL
- `OPENSEARCH_USERNAME` - OpenSearch credentials
- `OPENSEARCH_PASSWORD` - OpenSearch credentials
- `OPENSEARCH_INDEX_NAME` - Neural search index
- `OPENSEARCH_CONVERSATIONAL_INDEX_NAME` - Conversational search index
- `OPENSEARCH_NEURAL_CACHE_TTL` - Cache TTL (3600 seconds)
- `OPENSEARCH_DASHBOARDS_URL` - Dashboards URL

### 5. **Redshift Data Warehouse Port**

**File:** `.env` (line 54)

**Configuration:**
- **Connection:** `redshift://andrii.popenko:SupaDupaPass123!@redshift-production.db.customink.com:5439/cink`
- **Port:** `5439` (standard Redshift port)

**Environment Variable:**
- `REDSHIFT_READ_URL` - PostgreSQL-compatible read connection to Redshift

### 6. **All Service Connection Environment Variables**

**File:** `/Users/4thwithme/Documents/repo/recommendations-service/src/constants/env-variables.constant.ts`

```typescript
// Server Configuration

NODE_ENV = 'NODE_ENV'
GLOBAL_PREFIX = 'GLOBAL_PREFIX'

GRACEFUL_SHUTDOWN_DELAY = 'GRACEFUL_SHUTDOWN_DELAY'
IS_COMPACT_LOGS = 'IS_COMPACT_LOGS'
IS_JSON_LIKE_LOGS = 'IS_JSON_LIKE_LOGS'

// Database & Cache
DATABASE_URL = 'DATABASE_URL'
DATABASE_URL_READ_REPLICA = 'DATABASE_URL_READ_REPLICA'

REDIS_READ_URL = 'REDIS_READ_URL'
REDSHIFT_READ_URL = 'REDSHIFT_READ_URL'

// External Services
OPENAI_API_KEY = 'OPENAI_API_KEY'
ALG_APP_ID = 'ALG_APP_ID'

// Monitoring & Logging
```

### 9. **Application Bootstrap**

**Files:**
- `/Users/4thwithme/Documents/repo/recommendations-service/src/main.ts` - Main NestJS application entry point
- `/Users/4thwithme/Documents/repo/recommendations-service/bin/bootstrap` - Shell script that sets up dev environment

**How the App Starts:**

1. **Development:** `npm run start:dev` → Uses hot-reload with webpack
2. **Production:** `npm run start:prod` → Runs compiled `node dist/main`
3. **Docker:** `npm run start:prod` (line 70 in Dockerfile) - exposes port 8080

The app uses Fastify as the HTTP adapter (not Express).

### 10. **Docker Configuration**

**File:** `/Users/4thwithme/Documents/repo/recommendations-service/Dockerfile`

- **Base Image:** `916869144969.dkr.ecr.us-east-1.amazonaws.com/customink/nodejs:jammy-24`
- **Exposed Port:** `8080`
- **Health Check:** `curl -f http://localhost:8080/is_it_up`
- **Start Command:** `npm run start:prod`
- **Working Directory:** `/app`

**No docker-compose file exists** in the root directory. The project relies on environment-based configuration for all connections.

### Summary Table: All Ports

| Service | Port | Type | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| HTTP Server (Dev) | 9009 | HTTP | From PORT env var |
| HTTP Server (Test) | 9010 | HTTP | From PORT env var |
| HTTP Server (Prod) | 8080 | HTTP | Docker exposed |
| Redis Write | 6377 | TCP | REDIS_URL |
| Redis Read | 6378 | TCP | REDIS_READ_URL |
| MySQL Write | 3336 | TCP | DATABASE_URL |
| MySQL Read Replica | 3337 | TCP | DATABASE_URL_READ_REPLICA |
| OpenSearch | 9201 | HTTP | OPENSEARCH_HOST |
| OpenSearch Dashboards | 5601 | HTTP | OPENSEARCH_DASHBOARDS_URL |
| Redshift | 5439 | PostgreSQL | REDSHIFT_READ_URL |
